skill1.kitLine: Activates when landing 60 normal attack(s). Affects the target.
skill1.where: skill1[0] trigger hitCount count:60 + target enemy
skill1.note: Proc cadence + enemy targeting encoded on the first S1 block.

skill1.kitLine: Deals 158.43% of final ATK as additional damage.
skill1.note: Rider on the same every-60-hits proc; note says FB-by-timing default, crits by engine default, no core (plain 'additional damage').

skill1.kitLine: Activates when landing 60 normal attack(s). Affects self.
skill1.where: skill1[1] trigger hitCount count:60 + target self
skill1.note: Separate self-targeted block on the same 60-hit counter.
20/300 = 0.0667; note assumes engine adds ammo without interrupting fire → net mag ≈450 shots/cycle (⚑3, unverified).

skill2.kitLine: Activates when hitting the Core for 60 time(s). Affects the target.
skill2.where: skill2[0] trigger hitCount count:63 + requiresCore:true + target enemy
skill2.note: PROXY: no core-hit-count trigger exists in types.ts, so 60 core hits → hitCount 63 (=60÷0.95 engine flat MG core rate), gated by requiresCore so block is inert at zero core exposure. Documented confound (caveat 1).

skill2.kitLine: Deals 109.64% of final ATK as additional damage.
Activates at the beginning of Full Burst. Affects self.
skill2.note: Fires on team FB entry regardless of burster (hard rule 6), correct for 'beginning of Full Burst' wording.

burst.note: Kit-verified 67.2; note says reloadSpeedPct composes with reloadFrames 201 at sim.ts reloadFramesNeeded (shot-count channel).

documentedConfounds.text: skill2: the '60 core hits' proc is proxied as every 63 normal hits (engine MG core rate 0.95) — unmeasured estimate
documentedConfounds.why: The 63 count directly sets how often the 109.64% flatDamage rider fires; if the real per-band MG core rate differs from the flat 0.95 assumption, proc frequency (and thus damage) is wrong. Pin from footage (red CORE HIT popup fraction → count = round(60/coreRate)).

documentedConfounds.text: skill1: MG cadence tuple (fire rate / wind-up / reloadFrames 201) is datamined, unverified
documentedConfounds.why: Fire rate / wind-up / reloadFrames drive how fast hits accumulate, governing both S1 proc frequency (damageTaken + 158.43% rider + 20-round top-up) and overall MG DPS. Datamined, not measured.

documentedConfounds.text: ⚑3 — S1 20-round top-up economy: verify per-mag shot count ≈450 (=300/(1-1/3)) and that the in-game refill doesn't interrupt fire
documentedConfounds.why: instantReload fraction 0.0667 assumes ammo is added without interrupting fire; if the real refill interrupts or the effective mag differs, sustained DPS and reload cadence change.

documentedConfounds.text: PARSER BASELINE (HYPOTHESIS — NOT a validated model); every ⚑ is an UNMEASURED estimate; unit is MODEL_ONLY / never fielded (not owned)
documentedConfounds.why: Umbrella status, not a single mechanic: the whole override is unmeasured parser output, so there is no board data to gap against (board no-data). Sets expectation that ALL numbers are provisional rather than pointing at one discrepancy.

authorIntentSummary: The override is an explicit PARSER BASELINE / HYPOTHESIS (kit-parse AUTHOR wave 4), not a validated model — the unit is MODEL_ONLY and never fielded, and every value is an unmeasured estimate pending hand-tune against a real fight. The author modeled every kit line as blocks (unmodeled arrays empty, no MODELED_CONFIG fields): S1 = every-60-normal-hits boss Damage Taken +12.56%/3s plus a 158.43% flatDamage rider, and a self 20-round instantReload (fraction 0.0667); S2 = a core-hit proc PROXIED as hitCount 63 (=60÷0.95 MG core rate, requiresCore:true) dealing 109.64% flatDamage, plus a fullBurstEnter self Crit Rate +14.6%/10s; burst = self ATK +62.54%/10s + Reload Speed +67.2%/20s. Known-not-yet-faithful spots flagged ⚑: the S2 core-proxy count 63, the datamined MG cadence tuple (fire rate / wind-up / reloadFrames 201), and the 20-round reload top-up economy (≈450 shots/mag, non-interrupting refill).
